title: About
text:
Note



Draft. Replace this with your own bio before publishing.


I’m Prerna Tyagi. Data scientist moving into applied AI/ML engineering.
Each post on this site is paired with a from-scratch implementation in ml-applied-depth and an assignment notebook so a reader can build the same thing themselves before reading the worked version. Inspired by Tanul Singh’s gradient-descent-through-transformers series.
My main shipped product is Pragya Nursery — a real ordering platform I built for my father’s nursery in Greater Noida.
